title: Software Update - DFU - Software Update screen
scenario: Verify Software Update screen displays correctly with update message and active Continue button when a headset on outdated firmware is paired and connected.
steps: Pair and connect a headset that is on outdated firmware.
expected: Software Update screen is shown with the message "An update is available for your device. The update takes a few minutes to complete. Let's get started" and the Continue button is available and active.
